_source: NAEI Emission Degradation Methodology (2024), COPERT 5 v5.6, EEA Guidebook 2023 Ch.1.A.3.b
_note: Linear deterioration: EF(km) = EF_base * (1 + rate_per_km * min(mileage_km, cap_km)). Rates are fractional increase per km.

euro6_petrol._comment: Euro 6 ~ BS-VI. CO2 +0.2%/10k km, CO +0.4%/10k km, NOx +0.3%/10k km, HC +0.6%/10k km, PM +0.2%/10k km

euro4_petrol._comment: Euro 4 ~ BS-IV. Higher degradation rates due to less durable aftertreatment

euro6_diesel._comment: Diesel NOx and PM degrade faster due to SCR/DPF aging

sudden_failures._comment: Multiplicative factors applied to base emissions when failure occurs
